title: pyrus aria subvar. bellojocensis
intro: Pyrus aria subvar. bellojocensis, also known as the Himalayan mountain apple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Himalayan region. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus aria subvar. bellojocensis include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and may also be used as a tincture or in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
